name: ping
description: PING — a sonar-navigation game. Pure static web app, wrapped with Capacitor for the App Store.

scripts.sync:web: mkdir -p www && cp index.html style.css game.js levels.js audio.js manifest.json sw.js www/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:assets: npm run sync:web && npx capacitor-assets generate --ios
scripts.ios:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
